name: Continuous Girl
short_description: This is a casual game, the gameplay is eliminated for the connection, and it is suitable for adult children to play because of the thrilling content.
detailed_description:
The game is divided into normal mode and challenge mode.
Ordinary mode simple leisure, no time limit,and it is simple to play and watch.
Challenge mode every 300 seconds, more and more difficult, suitable for players who like to challenge.
Gameplay is paired for beautiful girls ' clothes, paired with clothes in the game to make them disappear.
Beautiful girl's troubles can the players help solve it?
I hope you will support a lot, your support is the guarantee of later works.
“Enter” the return input "123" to close the seal, "456" to open the seal.
